about.title: Meet your handyman
about.bio: After 20+ years of building experience around the world 🌍🌎🌏, I'm now based in Zürich 🇨🇭 offering a wide range of professional services — from electrical work, assembly and shelving, to furniture installation, painting, and home décor renovation 🏡.
about.expatNote: Fluent in English — proudly serving both the local and expat community 🤗.
about.highlight1.title: What to expect 🤔
about.highlight1.text: Fresh ideas that save you time and stress, aiming to your overall satisfaction, my top commitment 😊.
about.highlight2.title: What you truly get 🤩
about.highlight2.text: Professional-quality work ✨ at affordable prices 👌 — excellent results, a flawless finish 🤝, and the peace of mind + guarantee everyone looks for 😌.
about.highlight3.title: Who I serve 🤗
about.highlight3.text: Always happy to assist both the local community and the expat community across Zürich and the surrounding region.
